creator: roberto.nunnari@supsi.ch
text:
Hi.

I just noticed that this:
http://portaudit.freebsd.org/739b94a4-838b-11de-938e-003048590f9e.html
reports that the bug affects joomla15 < 1.5.15

That's wrong.

it affects joomla15 < 1.5.14

see:
http://developer.joomla.org/security/news/303-20090723-core-com-mailto-timeout-issue.html

This error causes portupgrade with portaudit db updated and in place to 
fail the upgrade.

Thank you.
Robi
--
